title: Floral Crispy American Chicken Casserole
description: A light, floral-infused American casserole that marries a crisp chicken crust with a sweet and savory braise, finished with a glossy swirl of white chocolate and edible flower accents.
instructions: Preheat the oven to 375 °F (190 °C). Season the chicken breasts with salt, pepper, smoked paprika, and garlic powder.
Heat the olive oil in a large oven‑proof skillet over medium‑high heat. Sear the chicken for 2–3 minutes on each side until golden brown. Remove and set aside.
In the same skillet, add the diced onions and carrots; sauté for about 5 minutes until softened.
Stir in the tomato paste and cook for 1 minute, then pour in the chicken broth and bring to a gentle simmer.
Return the chicken to the skillet, add fresh thyme leaves and lemon juice. Cover and transfer the skillet to the preheated oven; bake for 25 minutes.
Remove the skillet and transfer the chicken breasts to a baking dish. Sprinkle the sugar‑free white chocolate chips evenly over the chicken.
Broil the casserole on high for 2–3 minutes or until the chocolate has melted and formed a glossy crisp crust.
Remove from the oven, garnish with edible flower petals, and serve immediately.
